---
title: "Charlotte Sophia Fursdon"
---

## Charlotte Sophia Fursdon

**Dates:** (1846-1916)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Glow worm’, third daughter of the Rev. Edward Fursdon, and a contributor to <i>MP</i> (1893). [LG 1952 Fursdon]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 7th [1864]
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864
- Letter from June 27th 1862
- Letter from March 26th 1862
- Letter from March 24th 1862 
- Letter from Decr 31st [1861]
- Letter from Feb 26th 1861
- Letter from Decr 29th [1860s]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
